title: Crumbs v2 · identity card
subtitle: Shareable identity-card UI for the MBTI-roast video project. Closest to ship of the three side projects.

blocks.label: Current state
blocks.text: The generator works, the share card looks OK, but the UI needs one good polish pass before a public share-link. NEXT: **polish share-card UI** — typography, social-preview meta tags, animated reveal.

blocks.label: Draft PR open
blocks.text: **[#1 polish: social meta tags](https://github.com/Taylorblue123/crumbs/pull/1)** · branch `polish/social-meta-tags`. Build green. Adds OG + Twitter + WeChat meta + a 1200×630 OG image. Awaiting your review before merge.

blocks.markdown:
## Roadmap

- [x] MBTI-roast video generator
- [x] Identity-card skeleton (v2 branch)
- [ ] Share-card UI polish
- [ ] OpenGraph / Twitter meta tags for shared links
- [ ] Analytics hook (just counts, no PII)
- [ ] Launch post (draft on personal site)

## Known issues

- Typography hierarchy on the card is flat — everything is 16px
- No loading state when video is still generating
- Mobile layout breaks at 360px

## What the night-builder should attempt

When autonomy kicks in, the night builder will:
1. Check out `v2-identity-card` branch
2. Open a draft PR titled `polish: share-card typography + mobile fixes`
3. Make CSS-only changes (no logic churn)
4. Leave a comment with before/after screenshots
5. Stop — wait for Wenxuan to review + merge

items: Polish typography hierarchy on share card
